pages.heading: What is a Throw?
pages.body: When something is thrown into the air, it moves along a curved path. This is called projectile motion.

pages.heading: Why does it come down?
pages.body: The Earth pulls everything towards itself; this force is called gravity. This pull makes the ball fall to the ground.

pages.heading: Try it yourself!
pages.body: Move the sliders, change the speed and angle. See how far the ball goes!

errors.flat: No projectile at this angle, increase angle.
